subject: [PATCH v5 7/9] dax/kmem: extract hotplug/hotremove helper functions

2026-06-24.patch_summary: This patch refactors the kmem probe and remove functions by extracting helper functions to manage memory hotplug operations. The new helpers, dax_kmem_init_resources, dax_kmem_cleanup_resources, dax_kmem_do_hotplug, and dax_kmem_do_hotremove, enable future extensions for more granular control over memory hotplug. This refactoring is necessary to support hot-add functionality by separating resource management from hotunplug/cleanup operations.
